candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A-related summary line above Operating Result, but it is not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and also includes impairment, so it cannot be cleanly assigned to the selected COGS bucket.
Explicit operating D&A component line above Operating Result, but it is generic and not identified as relating to Materials and services / COGS.
Explicit operating D&A component line above Operating Result, but the label is generic and appears more than once with no clear COGS attribution.

variables.notes: Separate D&A lines do exist above Operating Result, which suggests D&A may sit outside the selected parent rows. However, the excerpt provides no clear mapping of those generic D&A rows to COGS versus SG&A, and the summary row also includes impairment. To avoid misallocation and double counting, no COGS-specific D&A row is selected.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A-related summary line above Operating Result, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/overhead and includes impairment, so it cannot be cleanly assigned to the selected XSGA bucket.
Explicit operating D&A component line above Operating Result, but it is generic and not identified as relating to Employee benefit expenses or Other operating expenses.
Explicit operating D&A component line above Operating Result, but the label is generic and appears more than once with no clear SG&A attribution.

final_choice.row_label: Total Amortization of Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill)

variables.notes: The statement shows separate operating D&A rows above Operating Result, so D&A may not be embedded in the selected XSGA rows. But none of the visible rows are specifically tied to SG&A/overhead, and the summary line includes impairment. Because attribution between COGS and XSGA is unclear, no XSGA-specific D&A row is selected.
